title: taraxacum subdahlstedtii
intro: Taraxacum subdahlstedtii, also known as the Swedish dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum subdahlstedtii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Taraxacum subdahlstedtii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often consumed as a dietary supplement to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
